error_signature: No fields - item(s) exist, but they're empty
title: Subworkflow returns empty fields despite data being present
symptom: The parent workflow calls a subworkflow, but it receives 'No fields - item(s) exist, but they're empty' even though the subworkflow has data to return.
applies_when: Subworkflow contains a POST request or Set node
not_this_if: Data is not being set correctly in the subworkflow
root_cause: The subworkflow may not be returning data due to a failure in execution or misconfiguration in the nodes. If the final node in the subworkflow does not output data correctly, the parent workflow will receive an empty response.
fix_steps: Ensure the final node in the subworkflow has 'Always Output Data' enabled.
Check the execution logs of both the parent and subworkflow for errors.
Add a Set node in the subworkflow to explicitly define output data.
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always Output Data' on the final node of the subworkflow and verify the execution logs.
